scripts.crawl:dropbox: START_URL=https://blog.dropbox.com/ HOST=blog.dropbox.com SITE_LABEL=blog.dropbox.com OUTPUT_PREFIX=dropbox-blog node src/crawl-site.js
scripts.summarize:dropbox: START_URL=https://blog.dropbox.com/ HOST=blog.dropbox.com SITE_LABEL=blog.dropbox.com OUTPUT_PREFIX=dropbox-blog SUMMARIZE_ONLY=true node src/crawl-site.js
scripts.render:build: npm install && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
